# SAFEinEA Incorporated

> SAFEinEA Incorporated is a Canadian Environmental Health and Safety (EHS) consulting firm offering workplace safety consulting, health and safety training, and environmental public health services. SAFE Work Manitoba endorsed. Founded by Bamidele Oni, CRSP.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.safeinea.ca/): Overview of services, mission, and how to engage SAFEinEA.
- [About](https://www.safeinea.ca/about): Company background, founder profile (Bamidele Oni CRSP), and organizational mission.
- [Environmental Public Health](https://www.safeinea.ca/EnvironmentalPublicHealth): Services including water quality testing, air quality sampling, community wellness programs, facility hygiene inspections, and food safety training.
- [Testimonials](https://www.safeinea.ca/testimonials): Client feedback and success stories.
- [Learning Management System](https://www.safeinea.ca/lms): Online health and safety training courses.

## Services

SAFEinEA provides:
- Workplace health and safety consulting and audits
- Health and safety training (in-person and online)
- Environmental public health assessments
- Water and air quality testing
- Food safety training and facility hygiene programs
- Community wellness programs
- On-site safety support across Canada

## AI Crawler Policy

AI crawlers are welcome to index all public pages listed above. The LMS course content behind authentication is not publicly accessible and should not be indexed.

## Contact

Website: https://www.safeinea.ca
